title: Election in Slovenia Will Test Europe’s Political Mood
summary_full: The center-left government is being challenged by a right-wing populist accused of launching a smear campaign in the final days of a close race.
summary_public: The center-left government is being challenged by a right-wing populist accused of launching a smear campaign in the final days of a close race.
